title: I Tested GLM 5.2 vs Opus 4.8 vs GPT 5.5
summary: Chase AI compared GLM 5.2, Claude Opus 4.8, and GPT 5.5 across multiple benchmarks including DeepSWE Bench to evaluate whether the hyped open source GLM 5.2 can match frontier closed models in performance. The video presents side-by-side testing results across multiple test cases to assess relative capabilities.
writeup: The video benchmarks the open-source GLM 5.2 against the proprietary Claude Opus 4.8 and GPT 5.5, running them through DeepSWE Bench and a set of custom test cases. The framing question is whether the heavily promoted GLM 5.2 holds up against frontier closed models. The takeaways center on the head-to-head results across these evaluations, with the open-source-versus-proprietary gap as the throughline.
